description:
Legal records. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Av and Elul 1527 Seleucid = 1216 CE. Headed by the glyph.

Verso, doc. 1: Abū l-Khayr Ibn al-Iskāf acknowledges a debt of 6.5 dinars to Maḥāsin b. Abū ʿAmāma, which he will repay in monthly installments of 1 dinar.

Verso, doc. 2: The three children of Maʿānī al-Ḥarīrī and an in-law of theirs sells something belonging to them in the town of Sammanūd to Abū l-Thanāʾ b. ʿ[...].

Verso, doc. 3: Involves Abū l-Faraj al-Ṣāʾigh and a sum of 10 qirats and Abū l-Surūr Ibn Maṭrūḥ. 

Recto: Quite damaged. Involves [...] Majd and [...] Maʿānī and an acknowledgment of debt.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
